title: Neon Orb Rush: Tower Uplink
objective: Survive a 3-minute traffic storm by clearing neon request orbs before they reach the tower core, while triggering short autoscale windows to stabilize overloaded floors and build score combos.

controls.input: Tap a moving neon orb before it reaches the tower
controls.outcome: The request is served, the lane is cleared, and your combo rises

controls.input: Tap a flashing tower floor when its scale ring appears
controls.outcome: That floor auto-clears matching orbs for a few seconds but leaves other lanes fully manual

controls.input: Tap a red overheating floor twice quickly
controls.outcome: Prevents a temporary shutdown that would disable scoring on that floor

steps: Neon request orbs stream toward three stacked tower floors from the screen edges and curve inward as they approach their target floor.
Tap orbs before impact to keep the server tower alive; missed orbs become breach hits, and too many breaches trigger a full outage failstate
Each clean hit adds combo, and combo boosts score multiplier until you miss, hit a decoy orb, or let a floor overheat.
Every few seconds one floor flashes with a scale ring; tap it to deploy a brief autoscale mode that clears its own traffic automatically.
The twist: during each autoscale window, a different floor enters a volatile reroute state where some orbs suddenly swap lanes mid-flight,so
Read the telegraphs: true request orbs leave a solid lane trail, rerouted orbs blink before switching floors, and decoy cache ghosts shimmer
Traffic density, orb speed, lane swaps, and overheat frequency escalate until the end of the short session.
scoring: Score comes from served requests, with a rising multiplier for uninterrupted clears. Activating autoscale at high combo adds a bonus, and end-of-run score goes to a simple local offline leaderboard.
tips: Prioritize orbs closest to the tower; breaches matter more than long combo greed.
Use autoscale on the busiest floor, not the emptiest one.
Watch for the blink telegraph before a reroute orb changes floors.
Patch overheats immediately or that floor stops paying combo points.
Audio helps: clean chimes mark safe clears, a harsh alarm warns of reroutes, and bass pulses signal incoming surge waves.

trendContext.title: server-survival Tower defense game that teaches cloud architecture. Build infrastructure, survive traffic, learn scaling.
